svg.text: TINA v0.2.1 - Terminal UI Network Analyzer

g.text: Mathiopoulos, Ohnishi & Feher, IEE Proc. I, vol. 136, no. 2, 1989. DOI:
In the continuous orthogonal basis (or when discrete sampling/weighting makes the basis orthogonal under the discrete inner product),
: adding higher terms does not change lower coefficients. In practice, with discrete least-squares fitting, this property holds approximately, though lower-order
Δy_n = max_x ∈[-1,1] [ c_n P_n(x) ] - min_x ∈[-1,1] [ c_n P_n(x) ]
